description: Address semantic review issues: stock movement transaction safety, PATCH body whitelisting, channel deletion cascade check, dashboard $queryRawUnsafe replacement, auth TODO comment, and input validation.
steps: Wrap stock movement creation and quantity update in prisma.$transaction, add insufficient stock check for OUT movements
Whitelist allowed fields in PATCH /api/stok/[id], PATCH /api/pengaturan/channels, PATCH /api/pengaturan/categories
Add cascade check before channel deletion
Replace $queryRawUnsafe with proper Prisma query in dashboard page, remove dead code
Add auth TODO comment in dashboard layout
Add basic input validation to chat POST and stock movement POST
acceptance_criteria: Stock movement uses prisma.$transaction and rejects OUT movements with insufficient quantity
PATCH endpoints only accept whitelisted fields
Channel deletion checks for related conversations first
Dashboard uses $queryRaw tagged template or Prisma query instead of $queryRawUnsafe
Dashboard layout has auth TODO comment
Chat POST validates message content length, stock movement validates positive integer quantity
npm run build completes without errors
